title: Use Optimized Connection Strings with mongosh
description:
Atlas provides multiple connection strings. These strings allow
you to connect to your clusters from both public and private contexts.
Atlas always assigns clusters unique connections
strings so that no two clusters share hostnames or
connection strings across Atlas.

headings.text: How do I identify which connection string my application uses?
